requirement_topic.en: NRCan Energy Efficiency Regulations, 2016 — Minimum energy performance for refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: NRCan《2016年能效法规》——电冰箱最低能效要求
requirement_topic.zht: NRCan《2016年能效法規》——電冰箱最低能效要求

summary.en: Refrigerators and combination refrigerator-freezers imported into Canada or shipped between provinces must meet the federal Energy Efficiency Regulations, 2016. The legally binding obligation is the regulation itself, including product-specific provisions for refrigerators and combination refrigerator-freezers, applicable testing standards incorporated by reference, verification mark requirements, and prescribed information for import or regulatory reporting. NRCan administers the federal energy-efficiency program.
summary.zh: 进口加拿大或在省际运输的电冰箱和冷藏冷冻箱须符合联邦《2016年能效法规》。具有法律约束力的是法规本身，包括针对电冰箱和冷藏冷冻箱的产品条款、通过引用纳入的适用测试标准、验证标志要求以及进口或法规申报所需信息。NRCan负责管理联邦能效项目。
summary.zht: 進口加拿大或在省際運輸的電冰箱和冷藏冷凍箱須符合聯邦《2016年能效法規》。具有法律約束力的是法規本身，包括針對電冰箱和冷藏冷凍箱的產品條款、通過引用納入的適用測試標準、驗證標誌要求以及進口或法規申報所需資訊。NRCan負責管理聯邦能效項目。

standards_or_laws: Energy Efficiency Regulations, 2016 (SOR/2016-311) — Part 2, Division 1, Subdivision E: Refrigerators and Combination Refrigerator-Freezers
Energy Efficiency Act — federal enabling act administered by Natural Resources Canada
NRCan energy efficiency reporting and verification mark requirements for regulated energy-using products

summary.en: China commonly controls household refrigerator energy performance through GB 12021.2 minimum allowable values and energy efficiency grades, together with China Energy Label registration and CCC-related appliance documentation. The Chinese test basis and label grades are not accepted as Canadian MEPS proof without mapping to the Canadian regulation and required NRCan filings.
summary.zh: 中国通常通过GB 12021.2能效限定值及能效等级、中国能效标识备案以及CCC相关器具文件控制家用电冰箱能效。中国测试依据和能效等级不能在未按加拿大法规及NRCan申报要求转换的情况下作为加拿大最低能效证明。
summary.zht: 中國通常通過GB 12021.2能效限定值及能效等級、中國能效標識備案以及CCC相關器具文件控制家用電冰箱能效。中國測試依據和能效等級不能在未按加拿大法規及NRCan申報要求轉換的情況下作為加拿大最低能效證明。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators
China Energy Label requirements for household refrigerators
CCC product documentation for household electric appliances

gap.en: Canada requires a Canadian regulatory determination for the covered product category, Canadian test method and MEPS calculation, verification mark, and prescribed import/reporting information. A China Energy Label or GB 12021.2 rating may support engineering review but does not satisfy NRCan reporting or Canadian MEPS obligations.
gap.zh: 加拿大要求按受管产品类别进行加拿大法规判定、采用加拿大测试方法和最低能效计算、具备验证标志并提交规定的进口/申报信息。中国能效标识或GB 12021.2等级可支持工程评估，但不满足NRCan申报或加拿大最低能效义务。
gap.zht: 加拿大要求按受管產品類別進行加拿大法規判定、採用加拿大測試方法和最低能效計算、具備驗證標誌並提交規定的進口/申報資訊。中國能效標識或GB 12021.2等級可支持工程評估，但不滿足NRCan申報或加拿大最低能效義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory federal obligation under Energy Efficiency Regulations, 2016 (SOR/2016-311); incorporated test standards are compliance methods under the regulation
mandatory_status.cn: GB 12021.2 and China Energy Label requirements are mandatory for covered household refrigerators in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Canadian MEPS as a fresh NRCan compliance exercise. Do not rely on CCC or China Energy Label files as a substitute for Energy Efficiency Regulations, 2016 reporting, verification marking, and Canadian energy-performance calculations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将加拿大最低能效视为新的NRCan合规项目。不得以CCC或中国能效标识文件替代《2016年能效法规》申报、验证标志和加拿大能效计算。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將加拿大最低能效視為新的NRCan合規項目。不得以CCC或中國能效標識文件替代《2016年能效法規》申報、驗證標誌和加拿大能效計算。

source.publisher: Department of Justice Canada / Natural Resources Canada
